message:
feat(fcp-store): add offline capability tracking (section 21)

Implement quantifiable offline access from FCP Specification V2 section 21:
- OfflineAccess: per-object tracking (local_symbols vs K threshold)
- OfflineCapability: aggregate tracking with HashMap<ObjectId, OfflineAccess>
- AccessPatternTracker: predictive pre-staging with EWMA frequency tracking
- OfflineSummary: readiness metrics in basis points
- 21 comprehensive unit tests with structured JSON logging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
